# Documentation

This directory contains the project's long-term documentation.

## Architecture

- ADR (Architecture Decision Records)

## Book

- English Edition
- Russian Edition

The repository root contains the project constitution and governance documents.

# Operating System for LLMs

An open research project exploring hierarchical orchestration of Large Language Models.

This repository is the single source of truth for the project.

## Documentation

### Governance

- [Project Charter](PROJECT_CHARTER.md)
- [Project Philosophy](PROJECT_PHILOSOPHY.md)
- [Memory Architecture](MEMORY_ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Roadmap](ROADMAP.md)
- [Decisions](DECISIONS.md)
- [Anti Goals](ANTI_GOALS.md)
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md)

### Project Documentation

- [Documentation Index](docs/README.md)
- [Architecture Decision Records](docs/adr/README.md)
- [Book (English)](docs/book/en/README.md)
- [Book (Russian)](docs/book/ru/README.md)

## Development Principles

- Git is the single source of truth.
- Chat is for discussion only.
- Engineering over Perfection.
- Small, verifiable commits.

# Decisions Log

## D-0001
Git is the single source of truth.

## D-0002
English is the canonical language.
Russian documentation is a synchronized translation.

## D-0003
Engineering over Perfection.

## D-0004
The project consists of three equally important parts:
- White Paper
- Architecture Specification
- Reference Implementation

## D-0005
The Kernel must remain independent of any particular LLM.

## D-0006
Project memory is layered.

## D-0007
Every new document must be reachable from README.md or docs/README.md.

## D-0008
Every Patch must leave the repository in a consistent navigable state.
